scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Penn requires applicants to submit the SAT or ACT for the 2025-26 application cycle, with a waiver available for hardship cases.

claims.claim: Penn requires applicants to submit the SAT or ACT for the 2025-26 application cycle, with a waiver available for hardship cases.
